notes: Cross-arcana world-state ambient injectors. Read by TarotGauntletGame at run start; when the relevant SaveSystem key is unlocked, the listed ambient_lines are appended to the run's ambient pool, and the listed gravity_extras are shuffled into the gravity deck. Lets one arcana's events haunt every future arcana's runs without rewriting per-arcana data. State injectors keyed to Claude-invented scenarios (conversation_began, brood_emergence, the_apartment_held, the_route_runs) were removed in the canon-alignment surgery. Will be re-added once canonical scenarios land. The sinkhole world state is the canonical Nexus event and is the deck's most pervasive ambient; it is currently underweighted (only 7 ambient lines, 2 gravity extras) and should be amplified in future passes — every arcana touches it.

states.label: THE SINKHOLE IS OPEN
states.description: Triggered by losing BLOW OUT THE CANDLES with the_steamboat_sails finale. The sinkhole has opened. The town has not been the same since. Canonically this is the central Nexus event of vol 5 — the original sinkhole happened circa June 2009 (per the Polaroid in vol5 ch6 Lovers); the deck's reopening at vol close (ch20 Judgement, 10:47 AM Central) is when Dante's riverboat sinks. Every arcana carries the echo.
ambient_lines: somebody's talking on the bank about the sinkhole. they don't agree.
the river is finding ways into rooms that used to be dry.
the cathedral is dark on the other side of town.
the air tastes like a thing that has gone under water and come back up.
the cicadas pause when they reach the part of the song the sinkhole is in.
somebody from the next town up the river is asking where the bank went.
the radio mentions the sinkhole and then doesn't again.

gravity_extras.title: the sinkhole widens
gravity_extras.flavor: somebody calls in to say a small piece of bank gave way an hour ago.

gravity_extras.title: the sinkhole settles
gravity_extras.flavor: for once tonight the town isn't talking about it.

states.label: THE FIRST SEVEN ARE DONE
states.description: Triggered by winning a scenario in each of the first seven arcanas. The town has been touched by every keeper.
ambient_lines: the room has a steadier shape tonight. you can feel the other rooms holding it up.
somebody on the radio mentions the riverboat and the warehouse in the same sentence.
frasier's lamp is on in the cathedral. you can see it through the window.

states.label: THE CANDLES HAVE BEEN LIT
states.description: Triggered by lighting the candles in BLOW OUT THE CANDLES. A small bright moment everyone remembers.
ambient_lines: the candles got lit. that was a different night.
frasier still looks at the workbench differently.
